prompt: I changed a public function signature in src/features/ai/mod.zig — added a new parameter. Now zig build test fails with a type mismatch. What did I forget?

assertions.text: Immediately identifies the mod/stub contract as the issue
Says to update src/features/ai/stub.zig with matching signature
Mentions types.zig for shared types between mod and stub
Explains why stubs exist (feature gating, comptime conditional imports)
